property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: getOnlineUsers_Success
testcase.system-out:

channel_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigserial not null, invitee_id bigint not null, inviter_id bigint not null, responded_at timestamp(6), status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('PENDING','ACCEPTED','REJECTED','EXPIRED')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table channel_invitations ( channel_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigserial not null, invitee_id bigint not null, inviter_id bigint not null, responded_at timestamp(6), status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('PENDING','ACCEPTED','REJECTED','EXPIRED')), primary key (id) ) 2026-04-01T16:27:34.153+05:30 DEBUG 16496 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table channel_members ( is_archived boolean not null, channel_id bigint not null, id bigserial not null, joined_at timestamp(6) not null, user_id bigint not null, role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('ADMIN','MEMBER')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table channel_members ( is_archived boolean not null, channel_id bigint not null, id bigserial not null, joined_at timestamp(6) not null, user_id bigint not null, role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('ADMIN','MEMBER')), primary key (id) ) 2026-04-01T16:27:34.160+05:30 DEBUG 16496 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table channels ( is_archived boolean not null, is_default boolean not null, is_deleted boolean not null, key (id) ) Hibernate: create table channels ( is_archived boolean not null, is_default boolean not null, is_deleted boolean not null, is_private boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, null, workspace_id bigint, content TEXT not null, pinned_by_name varchar(255), reply_to_content TEXT, reply_to_sender_name varchar(255), type varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table direct_messages ( is_deleted boolean not null, is_pinned boolean not null, edited_at timestamp(6), from_user_id bigint not null, id bigserial not null, pinned_by_user_id bigint, read_at timestamp(6),
